diagrams.title: Directory Information Tree (DIT) Structure
diagrams.description: Shows the hierarchical tree structure of a directory service from root to leaf nodes
diagrams.purpose: Understanding hierarchical organization of directory entries

diagrams.title: LDAP Operations Flow
diagrams.description: Illustrates the sequence of LDAP operations from binding to unbinding
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing the client-server interaction in LDAP

diagrams.title: Distinguished Name Components
diagrams.description: Shows the breakdown of a DN into its RDN components
diagrams.purpose: Understanding DN structure and path notation

diagrams.title: Directory Replication Model
diagrams.description: Depicts how directory data is replicated across multiple servers
diagrams.purpose: Understanding high availability and data synchronization

diagrams.title: Kerberos Authentication Flow
diagrams.description: Shows the ticket-based authentication process in Kerberos
